description.en: Return a list of options available in the specified section.

excerpt.en: Return a list of options available in the specified section.

description.en: This method transforms option names on every read, get, or set operation. The default converts the name to lowercase. This also means that when a configuration file gets written, all keys will be lowercase. Override this method if that’s unsuitable. For example: >>> config = """ ... [Section1] ... Key = Value ... ... [Section2] ... AnotherKey = Value ... """ >>> typical = configparser.ConfigParser() >>> typical.read_string(config) >>> list(typical['Section1'].keys()) ['key'] >>> list(typical[...

description.en: Transforms the option name option as found in an input file or as passed in by client code to the form that should be used in the internal structures. The default implementation returns a lower-case version of option; subclasses may override this or client code can set an attribute of this name on instances to affect this behavior. You don’t need to subclass the parser to use this method, you can also set it on an instance, to a function that takes a string argument and returns a string. Sett...
